description_long: This sconce features a striking wrought iron construction with a symmetrical, ornate design. The central element is a cross-like motif, surrounded by a teardrop-shaped frame adorned with evenly spaced, rounded protrusions. At the top, a fleur-de-lis finial adds a decorative flourish, while the lower section tapers into a conical handle or mounting base. The entire piece is dark in color, likely black or deep brown, with a matte, slightly rough finish typical of hand-forged metalwork. The design suggests a historical or traditional influence, possibly inspired by medieval or ecclesiastical motifs.
description: An ornate wrought iron sconce with a cross motif, teardrop frame, and fleur-de-lis finial, finished in dark matte metal.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full decorative face, including the cross motif, teardrop frame, and fleur-de-lis finial.
description_view_1: Side profile revealing the sconce's thin, flat construction and the depth of the protrusions.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with the same decorative elements visible but less detail on surface texture.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, again showing the flatness and the silhouette of the decorative frame.
attribute_fixture_design: Traditional and ornate, with medieval and ecclesiastical influences, featuring a cross motif and fleur-de-lis finial.
